title: Super Mario 64 - Wireframe Mode
description: While looking at random options on Project 64, I came across a graphic's configuration option in which you can enable wireframe rendering. I found it very interesting to be wandering around in Super Mario 64 with wireframe rendering enabled. You can see through all of the solid objects in the game. So... yeah. It's quite cool to see everything in sight, like in Jolly Roger Bay. No, I did not use Gameshark nor hack the ROM.
